[grey][blue][ARROW] Click to [green]enable this [blue]setting!

player_visibility.lore.false.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, wie [blue]Spieler angezeigt werden.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell werden [darker_red]keine Spieler angezeigt.
player_visibility.lore.false.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set how [blue]players are displayed.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, [darker_red]no players are shown.

player_visibility.lore.smart.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, wie [blue]Spieler angezeigt werden.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell ist [blue]smarte Sichtbarkeit aktiviert.
player_visibility.lore.smart.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set how [blue]players are displayed.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, [blue]smart visibility is enabled.

player_visibility.lore.strict.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, wie [blue]Spieler angezeigt werden.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell ist [blue]strikte Sichtbarkeit aktiviert.
player_visibility.lore.strict.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set how [blue]players are displayed.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, [blue]strict visibility is enabled.

player_visibility_exclusions.lore.none.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, welche Gruppen von der [blue]Spielersichtbarkeit ausgenommen sind.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell gibt es [darker_red]keine Ausnahmen.
player_visibility_exclusions.lore.none.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set which groups are excluded from [blue]player visibility.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, there are [darker_red]no exclusions.

player_visibility_exclusions.lore.friend.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, welche Gruppen von der [blue]Spielersichtbarkeit ausgenommen sind.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell sind [purple]Freunde ausgenommen.
player_visibility_exclusions.lore.friend.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set which groups are excluded from [blue]player visibility.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, [purple]friends are excluded.

player_visibility_exclusions.lore.clan.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, welche Gruppen von der [blue]Spielersichtbarkeit ausgenommen sind.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell sind [aqua]Clanmitglieder ausgenommen.
player_visibility_exclusions.lore.clan.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set which groups are excluded from [blue]player visibility.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, [aqua]clan members are excluded.

party_invites.lore.all.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, wer dir [blue]Party-Einladungen senden darf.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell darf dir [green]jeder [blue]Party-Einladungen senden!
party_invites.lore.all.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set who can send you [blue]party invites.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, [green]everyone can send you [blue]party invites!

party_invites.lore.friends.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, wer dir [blue]Party-Einladungen senden darf.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell dürfen nur deine [purple]Freunde dir [blue]Party-Einladungen senden!
party_invites.lore.friends.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set who can send you [blue]party invites.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, only your [purple]friends can send you [blue]party invites!

party_invites.lore.guild.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, wer dir [blue]Party-Einladungen senden darf.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell dürfen nur deine [blue]Gildenmitglieder dir [blue]Party-Einladungen senden!
party_invites.lore.guild.en-US:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set who can send you [blue]party invites.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, only your [blue]guild members can send you [blue]party invites!

party_invites.lore.none.de-DE:
[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Stelle ein, wer dir [blue]Party-Einladungen senden darf.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Aktuell darf dir [darker_red]niemand [blue]Party-Einladungen senden!

[grey][blue][ROUNDDOT] Set who can send you [blue]party invites.

[grey][blue][ARROW] Currently, [darker_red]no one can send you [blue]party invites!
